assertions.title: Deletion with children

steps.expected: Children become roots OR error on release with children
steps.observed: No children check - children retain stale parent_id to released tension

steps.action: Search for tests covering release with children
steps.observed: No tests found for releasing parent with children

evidence.testOutput:
No test exists for VAL-TENSION-012
store.rs:518-580 - update_status has no children check
evidence.observations: Current implementation allows releasing a tension with children. Children retain their parent_id pointing to the released tension (stale reference). Neither cascading (children becoming roots) nor error rejection is implemented.

assertions.issues: Assertion specification requires either cascading (children become roots) or error rejection when releasing a tension with children. Current implementation does neither - it leaves children with stale parent references.

evidence.testOutput:
test tension::tests::test_update_desired_on_resolved_fails ... ok
test tension::tests::test_update_desired_on_released_fails ... ok
test tension::tests::test_update_actual_on_resolved_fails ... ok
test tension::tests::test_update_actual_on_released_fails ... ok
test store::tests::test_update_on_resolved_tension_fails ... ok
test store::tests::test_update_on_released_tension_fails ... ok
evidence.observations: update_desired() and update_actual() both fail on Resolved or Released tensions with UpdateOnInactiveTension error. Status must be Active for field mutation. Original values preserved on failure.

summary: Tested 13 assertions: 12 passed, 1 failed. VAL-TENSION-012 (Deletion with children) failed - the implementation allows releasing a tension with children without either cascading (making children roots) or rejecting with an error. Children retain stale parent_id references to the released tension. All other tension assertions pass with comprehensive test coverage (116 total tests in suite, all passing).
